phrases.text_local: Onde fica a entrada do Arco da Porta Nova?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH ayngt-RAH-duh DOO AH-ruh-koo DUH PAW-ruh-tuh NAW-vuh?

likely_response.local: Pode seguir as placas para o Arco da Porta Nova, que fica no centro histórico.
likely_response.pronunciation: PAW-dih sih-GEER UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW AH-ruh-koo DUH PAW-ruh-tuh NAW-vuh, KIH FEE-kuh NOO SAYNGT-roo eesh-TAW-ree-koo.
likely_response.translation_en: Where is the entrance to the Arco da Porta Nova? You can follow the signs to the Arco da Porta Nova, which is in the historic center.

responses.english: Where is the entrance to the Arco da Porta Nova? You can follow the signs to the Arco da Porta Nova, which is in the historic center.
responses.phonetic: PAW-dih sih-GEER UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW AH-ruh-koo DUH PAW-ruh-tuh NAW-vuh, KIH FEE-kuh NOO SAYNGT-roo eesh-TAW-ree-koo.
responses.french: Pode seguir as placas para o Arco da Porta Nova, que fica no centro histórico.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the palace museum is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o Museu dos Biscainhos?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW moo-ZEHOO DOOSH beesh-KUHEE-nyoosh?
phrases.cultural_note: The museum is housed in a 17th-century manor house, typical of Braga's baroque architecture.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Museu dos Biscainhos.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW moo-ZEHOO DOOSH beesh-KUHEE-nyoosh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Biscainhos Museum.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Biscainhos Museum.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW moo-ZEHOO DOOSH beesh-KUHEE-nyoosh.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o Museu dos Biscainhos.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to park and pay
phrases.text_local: Onde estaciono e pago a taxa de estacionamento?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih shtuh-SEEOH-noo EH PAH-goo AH TAH-shuh DIH shtuh-seeoo-nuh-MAYNG-too?
phrases.cultural_note: Braga's historic center uses on-street pay-and-display zones; payment is mandatory during daytime hours.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para os parquímetros.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh OOSH puh-ruh-KEE-miht-roosh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the parking meters.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the parking meters.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh OOSH puh-ruh-KEE-miht-roosh.
responses.french: Siga as placas para os parquímetros.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the arch entrance is
phrases.text_local: Scusi, onde fica o Arco da Porta Nova?
phrases.pronunciation: skoo-ZEE, OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW AH-ruh-koo DUH PAW-ruh-tuh NAW-vuh?
phrases.cultural_note: Arco da Porta Nova is a historic gateway arch in Braga's old town, often a meeting point.

likely_response.local: Na Rua do Souto, perto da Sé.
likely_response.pronunciation: NUH ROOUH DOO SOHW-too, PEHR-too DUH SEH.
likely_response.translation_en: On Rua do Souto, near the Cathedral.

responses.english: On Rua do Souto, near the Cathedral.
responses.phonetic: NUH ROOUH DOO SOHW-too, PEHR-too DUH SEH.
responses.french: Na Rua do Souto, perto da Sé.
